mapper.select: SELECT c.*, COALESCE(s.quantity, 0) AS quantity FROM dev_warehouse_category c LEFT JOIN dev_warehouse_stock s ON s.category_id = c.id WHERE c.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY c.sort ASC, c.id ASC
SELECT c.*, COALESCE(s.quantity, 0) AS quantity FROM dev_warehouse_category c LEFT JOIN dev_warehouse_stock s ON s.category_id = c.id WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dev_warehouse_category (name, type, color, sort, del_flag, create_by, create_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{type}, #{color}, #{sort}, '0', #{createBy}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE dev_warehouse_category SET del_flag = '2' WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, c.name AS category_name, c.color AS category_color, c.type AS category_type FROM dev_warehouse_stock s JOIN dev_warehouse_category c ON c.id = s.category_id AND c.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY c.sort ASC

SELECT s.*, c.name AS category_name, c.color AS category_color, c.type AS category_type FROM dev_warehouse_stock s JOIN dev_warehouse_category c ON c.id = s.category_id WHERE s.category_id = #{categoryId}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s.quantity), 0) FROM dev_warehouse_stock s JOIN dev_warehouse_category c ON c.id = s.category_id AND c.del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dev_warehouse_stock (category_id, quantity, sub_type, note, update_by, update_time) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{quantity}, #{subType}, #{note}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE dev_warehouse_stock SET quantity = #{quantity}, sub_type = #{subType}, note = #{note}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
